title: stelis spathuliformis
intro: Stelis spathuliformis, also known as the "yellow orchid" or "panama yellow orchid," is a species of orchid native to Panama. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis spathuliformis include its ability to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. Herbal preparations of Stelis spathuliformis often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
